Hero.title: Welcome to Our Company
Hero.subtitle: We provide premium solutions for your business

ServicesPreview.subtitle: From a single social clip to a full documentary — our end-to-end post-production services cover everything your project needs.

video-editing.title: Video Editing
video-editing.description: Precise cuts, rhythm-driven pacing, and narrative structure that transforms raw footage into compelling stories.

color-grading.title: Color Grading
color-grading.description: Cinematic color science — from log-to-rec709 transforms to custom LUTs that define your brand's visual signature.

motion-graphics.title: Motion Graphics
motion-graphics.description: Animated lower-thirds, kinetic typography, and brand intros that add professional polish to every frame.

showreel.title: Showreel Production
showreel.description: Curated highlight reels that showcase your best work with maximum impact — cut to music, timed to perfection.

audio-design.title: Audio Design
audio-design.description: Sound design, music licensing, dialogue clean-up, and final mix so your video sounds as good as it looks.

vfx.title: VFX & Compositing
vfx.description: Green-screen keying, particle systems, and seamless compositing that pushes creative boundaries.

corp-summit-reel.title: Summit 2024 Highlight Reel

ProcessTimeline.subtitle: A streamlined four-step process built for speed, clarity, and creative excellence.

01.title: Discovery Brief
01.description: We dive deep into your vision, audience, and goals. A shared creative brief ensures we're aligned before a single frame is touched.

02.title: Editing & Assembly
02.description: Our editors craft the rough cut — narrative structure, pacing, and rhythm — using the footage and brief as our compass.

03.title: Review & Refine
03.description: You receive a private link to review. Feedback is collected, revisions are made — up to 3 rounds until it's exactly right.

04.title: Final Delivery
04.description: Broadcast-ready files delivered in your required formats — 4K ProRes, H.264, vertical cuts, platform-specific exports, all in one package.

Testimonials.subtitle: From independent filmmakers to global brands — here's what our clients say about working with us.

1.quote: FrameForge turned our raw footage into a cinematic brand film that exceeded every expectation. The color grade alone was worth every penny.
1.name: Sophia Reinhardt

2.quote: The fastest, most communicative post-production team we've ever worked with. 48-hour turnarounds without sacrificing an ounce of quality.
2.name: Marcus Osei

3.quote: They understood our documentary's emotional core immediately. The edit made our subjects' stories feel truly heard.
3.name: Lena Voss

4.quote: Our TVC increased conversions by 34% — we attribute that directly to the world-class editing and motion work from FrameForge.
4.name: James Harlow

5.quote: Six music videos in and they still bring fresh energy to every project. The VFX compositing on our last release was absolutely stunning.
5.name: Aida Serrano

6.quote: Professional, creative, and obsessively detailed. FrameForge is our go-to for every corporate video project.
6.name: Daniel Kwame

Footer.tagline: We craft cinematic visual stories for brands that demand excellence. From raw footage to final frame — perfected.

hero.sub: FrameForge is a boutique post-production studio obsessed with craft. We don't just cut video — we build emotion, frame by frame.

mission.body_1: The best edit is one where the audience never notices the cut. They're too busy feeling the story. At FrameForge, every decision — every frame held, every transition chosen, every colour pushed — serves the narrative above all else.
mission.body_2: We founded this studio on a simple belief: that post-production deserves the same creative investment as production itself. Great footage, poorly edited, is wasted potential. We exist to unlock that potential.
mission.quote: "Cinema is a mirror by which we often see ourselves."

Marco Visconti.bio: Former feature film editor with credits on 3 Sundance selections. Marco set up FrameForge to bring cinematic quality to every format.

Priya Nair.bio: Certified DaVinci Resolve colorist with a background in commercial and documentary grade. Priya's palettes are unmistakably cinematic.

Remy Fontaine.bio: Motion designer and After Effects specialist. Remy transforms static brand identities into kinetic, living animations.

Aaliyah Brooks.bio: Nuke-certified compositor with a passion for invisible effects. Aaliyah makes the impossible look effortless.

hero.sub: Have a project in mind? Drop us a line and we'll get back to you with a custom quote and proposed timeline.

form.msg_plh: Describe your project, timeline, and any specific requirements...

cta.title: Your Project Could Be Next
cta.sub: Let's create something you're proud to share.

hero.sub: We offer a full suite of finishing services under one roof. Work with us for the entire process, or bring us in for specific disciplines.

offline-edit.title: Offline Editing
offline-edit.description: The foundation of every great piece. We shape the narrative, establish pacing, and build the story structure. We cut on Premiere Pro, Avid, or DaVinci depending on your workflow needs.

color-grade.title: Color Grading
color-grade.description: We don't just balance shots — we create a look. Our grading suite is calibrated for cinema and broadcast standards, ensuring your film looks perfect on a 60-foot screen or an iPhone.

motion-vfx.title: Motion & VFX
motion-vfx.description: From invisible clean-ups to full CG product integrations. We handle 2D motion graphics, kinetic typography, green-screen keying, and compositing.

audio-post.title: Audio Post
audio-post.description: Video is 50% sound. We clean up production audio, design immersive soundscapes, and deliver broadcast-compliant mixes that punch through.

cta.title: Ready to Cut?
cta.sub: Send us your brief, and we'll assemble the perfect team and workflow for your project.
